forecast-period.text: Mostly clear. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Mostly clear. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the afternoon. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely from the late morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 20 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny morning. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 20 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Cloudy. Patchy morning fog in the west. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Clear. Light winds.

Cloudy. Patchy fog in the early morning. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Patchy fog in the east in the early morning. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely later tonight. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Hawker in the morning. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Ceduna, most likely later this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly during the morning then increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm at night. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the far west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 26.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 40 km/h before tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 28.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the far northeast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
